source_pr.title: executor: fix bug when sort meets apply.
source_pr.body:
I forgot to set sort's Idx.
@winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select (select id from s where s.id = t.id order by s.id) from t") (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select (select id from s where s.id = t.id order by s.id) from t") (executor/join_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select (select id from s where s.id = t.id order by s.id) from t") (executor/join_test.go)
